notes: Fold the polished install wizard into webui.h. Replaces the parked v1.0.6 wizard markup with the 7-step takeover from the ui-preview mock-up: animated pulse, rotating arrow, ripple-on-press, inline speaker picker, live volume gauge that fills as Sonos vol moves, animated check-draw. State machine driven by /api/status — no simulate-event chip on real hardware. Full-screen takeover when setupComplete=false or /?wizard=1 — masthead, banner, landing, and Advanced all hide.
